query:
INSERT INTO quizzes (videoId, title, titleSwahili, description, descriptionSwahili, passingScore, isPublished) VALUES
(1, 'FMC Origins: Our Heritage', 'Asili za FMC: Urithi Wetu', 'Test your knowledge about the origins of the Free Methodist Church and John Wesley\'s legacy.', 'Jaribu maarifa yako kuhusu asili ya Kanisa la Methodist Huru na urithi wa John Wesley.', 70, 1),
(2, 'FMC Core Beliefs', 'Imani za Msingi za FMC', 'Assess your understanding of the core doctrinal beliefs of the Free Methodist Church.', 'Tathmini uelewa wako wa imani za msingi za kiteolojia za Kanisa la Methodist Huru.', 70, 1),
(3, 'Holy Living: Practical Examples', 'Maisha Takatifu: Mifano Inayotumika', 'Test your understanding of holiness and how to live a holy life in practical ways.', 'Jaribu uelewa wako wa utakatifu na jinsi ya kuishi maisha takatifu kwa njia inayotumika.', 70, 1),
(4, 'FMC Church Organization', 'Muundo wa Kanisa la FMC', 'Understand how the Free Methodist Church is organized and how decisions are made.', 'Elewa jinsi Kanisa la Methodist Huru linavyoanzishwa na jinsi maamuzi yanavyofanywa.', 70, 1),
(5, 'FMC Leadership Roles', 'Majukumu ya Uongozi wa FMC', 'Learn about the different leadership roles in the Free Methodist Church and their responsibilities.', 'Jifunze kuhusu majukumu tofauti ya uongozi katika Kanisa la Methodist Huru na wajibu wao.', 70, 1),
(6, 'FMC Social Justice', 'Haki ya Kijamii ya FMC', 'Understand FMC\'s commitment to social justice and caring for the marginalized.', 'Elewa jitihada ya FMC kuhusu haki ya kijamii na kuangalia wasiojiweza.', 70, 1);
